title.en: Blessed Clementine Anuarite, Virgin and Martyr

plain.en: O God our Father, who have called Blessed Anuarite to follow the Lord through a life of holiness, faithfulness and martyrdom; grant, we beseech you, that we may follow Christ as she did and one day join her in your Kingdom. Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son, who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit, one God, for ever and ever.

en.text: who have called Blessed Anuarite to follow the Lord
through a life of holiness, faithfulness and martyrdom;
that we may follow Christ as she did
and one day join her in your Kingdom.
Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son,
who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit,
one God, for ever and ever.
